---
format: 
  typst: 
    title: Esteban Degetau
    subtitle: Curriculum Vitae
    papersize: us-letter
    date: today
    date-format: long
brand: false
tbl-colwidths: [75,25]
---

## Contact

::: smallcaps
|  |  |  |
|:----------------------------|:-------------------------:|---------------:|
| [estebandegetau\@gmail.com](mailto:estebandegetau@gmail.com) | [www.estebandegetau.com](https://www.estebandegetau.com) | Mexico City, Mexico |

: {tbl-colwidths="\[33,34,33\]"}
:::

## Education

{{< include education.qmd >}}

## Working Papers

{{< include ../research/working_papers.qmd >}}

## Work Experience

### Research

|  |  |
|:-------------------------------------------------------|---------------:|
| **World Bank** |  |
| Short-term Consultant - Macroeconomics and Growth, Development Research Group, practice to Agustín Samano | Oct 2025 - Present |

|  |  |
|--------------------------------------------------------|---------------:|
| **ITAM** |  |
| Graduate Research Assistant - Center for Economic Research (CIE), practice to Joyce Sadka and Enrique Seira | Jan 2022 - Feb 2023 |

### Public Service

|                                                 |                     |
|-------------------------------------------------|--------------------:|
| **Instituto Mexicano del Seguro Social (IMSS)** |                     |
| Deputy Head, Fiscal Policy Planning             | Mar 2023 - Sep 2025 |

### Teaching

{{< include ../teaching/classes.qmd >}}

<!-- ### Industry Experience

|                         |                      |
|-------------------------|---------------------:|
| **CEROMULTAS**          |                      |
| Senior Business Analyst |       Jan - Dec 2021 |
| Business Analyst        | July 2019 - Dec 2020 |

|                             |                 |
|-----------------------------|----------------:|
| **T-Rez Consulting**        |                 |
| International Trade Analyst | July - Dec 2018 | -->

## Recognitions

{{< include recognitions.qmd >}}

## Certifications

{{< include certifications.qmd >}}

## Technical Skills

{{< include skills.qmd >}}
